title: Neoporteria nigrihorrida
taxonomy: Neoporteria nigrihorrida is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Neoporteria, which is a group of cacti that are native to the Atacama Desert in Chile. The genus Neoporteria is a relatively small group of cacti that are known for their unique and often brightly colored flowers. Neoporteria nigrihorrida is a relatively rare species within this genus, and its classification is based on its distinct characteristics and physical appearance.
